description: Context gathered for an annotation. Includes source document excerpts, metadata, and graph-derived context. Used by both Find (bind) and Generate (yield) flows.

annotation.description: The annotation this context was gathered for

sourceContext.description: Text context from the source document

before.description: Text appearing before the selected passage

selected.description: The selected text passage (the annotation target)

after.description: Text appearing after the selected passage

metadata.description: Context metadata about the annotation and its source

language.description: BCP 47 language tag of source content

entityTypes.description: Entity types associated with the annotation

userHint.description: User-provided textual hint to supplement or replace the selected text for search and generation

graphContext.description: Graph-derived context from the knowledge base

connections.description: Resources connected to the source resource via annotations

entityTypes.description: Entity types on the connected resource

bidirectional.description: Whether the connection goes both ways

citedByCount.description: Number of other resources that reference the source resource

citedBy.description: Resources that reference the source resource

siblingEntityTypes.description: Entity types from other annotations on the same resource

entityTypeFrequencies.description: Global frequency counts for entity types (for IDF-like weighting)

inferredRelationshipSummary.description: LLM-generated summary of the annotation's relationships in the knowledge graph
